title: Cache top-of-tree node values for deterministic rounds
methodology: Cached the root and its two children once in scratch, then special-cased vector rounds at deterministic depths 0 and 1 to replace per-lane node gather loads with broadcasts plus a register-level select.
motivation: Brief suggested combining successful elements from the current best experiments; this combines exp-022 deterministic root specialization with the depth-1 node caching direction from exp-021 in a single top-of-tree memory optimization.
